title: Bibi defies Trump's call for restraint; Israel & Iran trade blows: How the sudden flare-up unfolded
content: The strikes could also derailed ​​United States presdient Donald Trump's last-ditch effort to find an off ramp in the war by negotiating a nuclear deal with Iran. Trump, who had been breathing down the Netanyahu's neck to restrain from hostilites, in a recent interview spoke on how he "calls the shot", affirming that Netanyahu must accept the Iran deal to put cessation to the bloody war.

title: Watch: Indigo stepladder crashes into parked Air India aircraft at Delhi airport
content: Strong winds and rain at Delhi airport caused a passenger stepladder to roll into a parked Air India aircraft. The sudden weather event also blew ground support equipment into three other Air India planes, damaging them and forcing them out of service. No injuries were reported during the chaotic incident.

title: Son caught cheating, cop ‘vandalises’ Dehradun college office, threatens teachers
content: A police sub-inspector and four associates allegedly stormed a Dehradun polytechnic college, vandalizing property and threatening staff after his son was caught cheating. CCTV footage captured both the cheating incident and the subsequent alleged assault. Both parties have filed FIRs, and the SI has been suspended pending investigation.

title: Mosque, mazar, 2 temples: Jaipur sees internet curbs before anti-encroachment drive
content: Mobile internet services, including social media, have been suspended for 24 hours in Jaipur North and East districts ahead of a JDA anti-encroachment drive. The drive aims to remove five religious structures to widen the Nandpuri Underpass. Authorities will monitor social media for misinformation and warned of strict action against those spreading religious frenzy or hatred.

title: Palantir CEO almost hates AI word 'tokenmaxxing', compares it to 'bad addiction'
content: Palantir CEO Alex Karp slammed "tokenmaxxing," the AI industry's hottest trend, comparing the compulsive overuse of AI tokens to a porn addiction on the TBPN podcast. Speaking at Palantir's AIPCon 10, Karp said companies burn tokens that look like productivity but deliver nothing. He argued LLMs enhance, not replace, domain expertise, as Silicon Valley's tokenmaxxing backlash grows amid rising AI costs.

title: 'Thank you, darling': Trump storms out of NBC interview after calling interviewer 'stupid'
content: Donald Trump abruptly ended a "Meet the Press" interview with Kristen Welker, accusing her and major news networks of being "crooked" and "stupid" after she pressed him for evidence of election fraud. Trump also defended his "anti-weaponisation fund" proposal, claiming political prosecutions have destroyed lives.

title: Rupee begins week at 95.35 against US dollar amid Middle East chaos
content: The rupee opened lower against the dollar, influenced by a stronger greenback, rising crude oil prices, and geopolitical tensions in the Middle East. This decline followed a strong gain on Friday, as investors remained cautious ahead of key US economic data and potential Federal Reserve interest rate decisions.

title: Meta's highest-paid employee’s 'health message' to Anthropic, OpenAI & Google
content: Meta's top AI executive, Alexandr Wang, revealed the company's strategy to challenge rivals like OpenAI and Google by focusing on health-related AI capabilities. While acknowledging current models aren't top-tier, Wang highlighted Meta's commitment to advancing AI for health applications, aiming to integrate these features into popular platforms like Facebook and Instagram.

title: 'Why are you asking this question?': Harmanpreet puts reporter in awkward spot - Watch
content: Ahead of the Women's T20 World Cup in England, Indian captain Harmanpreet Kaur shut down a reporter asking if this was her final tournament, bluntly counter-questioning if she should retire. India is placed in a demanding Group A alongside heavyweights like Australia and South Africa, and begins its campaign against arch-rivals Pakistan on June 14.

title: Driving licence may remain valid till holder turns 50
content: The government is considering extending driving license validity until holders turn 50, aiming to reduce public inconvenience. Additionally, vehicle ownership transfers and permit renewals are slated to become fully online. These measures, along with a negative points system for traffic violations, are expected to streamline processes and improve road safety.

title: As Jamie Dimon calls Elon Musk 'Edison of our time', Musk says: There will not be much AC left
content: As SpaceX eyes a historic IPO, JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon likened Elon Musk to Thomas Edison. This sparked online debate, with many championing Nikola Tesla. Musk himself weighed in, acknowledging Edison's brilliance while asserting DC's future dominance over AC, citing solar, batteries, and EVs as key drivers.

title: Watch: Buildings turn to rubble after powerful 8.1 earthquake hits Philippines
content: A powerful 8.1-magnitude earthquake struck the Philippines, causing buildings to collapse and triggering tsunami warnings. High school and university structures were among those damaged, with viral videos showing crumbling buildings. Authorities issued tsunami warnings for the Philippines and neighboring Indonesia, with potential waves exceeding one meter.

title: 'Rajasthan ka Jadeja': Making of Manav Suthar, India's newest left-arm spin hope
content: Manav Suthar's Test debut against Afghanistan was the culmination of a six-to-seven-year focus on red-ball cricket. Moments before receiving India cap No. 319, the left-arm spinner called coach Dheeraj Sharma, who reminded him to trust his skills. Suthar responded with 28 runs and figures of 3/21 on debut. His coach reveals how Rahul Dravid's guidance, Shubman Gill's backing and a deliberate decision to prioritise Test cricket helped shape the spinner many in Rajasthan now call "Rajasthan ka Jadeja".

title: 'I call the shots': Trump insists Iran deal on track amid fresh strikes, says Bibi has 'no choice'
content: President Trump asserted that Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu would have no choice but to accept any Iran deal negotiated by Washington, stating he calls the shots. Despite Iran's missile attack on Israel and subsequent Israeli strikes, Trump insisted the escalation would not impact ongoing negotiations.

title: Ctrl+alt+examine: Can India's biggest exams go online?
content: India's massive entrance exam system faces a digital dilemma. While online tests promise cost savings, speed, and reduced environmental impact, significant digital divides in infrastructure and familiarity pose major hurdles. Ensuring equitable access and preparation for all students remains paramount before a widespread shift can be considered successful.

title: PMAY-G housing scheme: Are you eligible? Benefits, application process explained
content: India's Pradhan Mantri Awaas Yojana–Gramin is a massive rural housing mission providing pucca homes with basic amenities to millions. Launched in 2016, it aims to eliminate housing deprivation by 2024, offering financial aid, credit, and convergence with sanitation and employment schemes. Beneficiary selection prioritizes the most deprived, ensuring dignity and stability for rural families.

title: 3 untouched pizzas, vacant apartment and murder: How Hyderabad techie was shot in US
content: A Hyderabad man, Anshul Kuncha, was tragically shot and killed while delivering pizzas in Philadelphia. His grieving family is now focused on bringing his body home and seeking justice, suspecting he was lured to a vacant apartment through a fake delivery order. Authorities are investigating the incident, and the family is seeking government assistance for repatriation.

title: ‘Don’t expect the world from Sooryavanshi’: Ganguly urges patience with teenage prodigy
content: Sourav Ganguly urges patience for 15-year-old batting sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, who earned an India call-up after a stellar IPL. Ganguly acknowledges the shift to international conditions and advises against immediate high expectations. The BCCI is supporting Sooryavanshi's transition by allowing his parents to accompany him on tours, ensuring his comfort in the senior setup.

title: Watch: Missiles rain across Israel's night sky as Iran launches fresh attacks
content: Iran launched missiles at Israel, triggering air raid sirens and forcing millions to shelters. Israel claims to have intercepted the projectiles, but explosions were heard. Tehran warned of broader retaliation after an earlier Israeli strike. Meanwhile, former US President Trump urged restraint, reportedly persuading Prime Minister Netanyahu to hold off on immediate response.

title: 100 days of Middle East crisis: Oil prices jump over 3% as Iran-Israel resume war
content: Middle East tensions surged, pushing oil prices up over 3% as the crisis hit its 100th day with little peace progress.  Recent Israeli strikes in Iran and Lebanon, despite a truce, have dimmed hopes for a deal and reopening the vital Strait of Hormuz.  OPEC+'s approved output increase faces hurdles due to supply disruptions.

title: Patrick Mahomes & Brittany Mahomes net worth 2026: Earnings & lifestyle
content: Patrick Mahomes is embracing his quick recovery by enjoying sports with wife Brittany Mahomes. Their shared passion for sports extends to investments in various franchises. They co-own the Kansas City Current. The couple has been high school sweethearts. They have built a life together with three children and a luxurious Missouri mansion.

title: Bills linked to $8M Saints star in potential blockbuster trade
content: The Buffalo Bills are being linked to New Orleans Saints running back Alvin Kamara as trade speculation continues to grow around the veteran star’s future. Analysts believe Buffalo could pursue Kamara because of his connection to new Bills offensive coordinator Pete Carmichael, who previously coached him in New Orleans. While Kamara’s production has declined in recent years, his pass-catching ability still makes him valuable. The Saints are also facing salary cap pressure, which could push them toward considering a trade before the 2026 NFL season begins.

title: Will Lionel Messi play vs Iceland? Latest injury update and return timeline
content: Lionel Messi has been focusing on his recovery from muscle fatigue and an overload in his left hamstring after he injured himself on 24th May during an MLS match with Inter Miami, sparking major concern among all his fans. With Argentina gearing up for its second friendly match against Iceland and its first match in the World Cup 2026 against Algeria, Lionel Messi’s health has sparked major concern among fans.

title: Titan, Bharti Airtel & more: Top stocks to watch on June 8
content: Analysts are bullish on Titan, projecting strong jewellery revenue growth and market share gains. Bharti Airtel's mobile money arm, Airtel Money, is set for a significant IPO. Adani Ports shows robust cargo volume growth, exceeding expectations. Maruti Suzuki is poised to benefit from first-time buyer segment revival and market share expansion.

title: 'She refused to sell': How multi-crore Bengal property led to killing of DU professor
content: A Delhi University professor's murder in east Delhi has been linked to a multi-crore ancestral property in West Bengal. Police arrested a couple from Bardhaman and apprehended their minor son, alleging they killed the professor after she refused to sell her share of the inherited property.

title: Philadelphia Eagles linked to blockbuster trade for $20 million Las Vegas Raiders star
content: Rumors are growing around a potential blockbuster trade between the Philadelphia Eagles and Las Vegas Raiders involving five-time Pro Bowler Maxx Crosby. ESPN analyst Bart Scott believes Eagles GM Howie Roseman could make another aggressive move after missing out on Myles Garrett. While the Raiders are not actively shopping Crosby, Philadelphia reportedly remains interested if Las Vegas struggles early this season.

title: 5 heartfelt things Virat Kohli said about Anushka Sharma
content: Virat Kohli's heartfelt proclamations of affection for Anushka Sharma paint a beautiful picture of their bond. From attributing his renewed vigor during a long batting slump to her unwavering support, to revealing his feelings during moments of captaincy pressure, Kohli consistently acknowledges her impact on his life.

title: Eriksen update: Denmark issue statement after he collapses, match abandoned
content: Christian Eriksen collapsed during Denmark’s friendly against Ukraine and was taken to hospital for further tests. The Danish federation said he was conscious and doing well, while team doctor Morten Boesen said the pacemaker appeared to work as intended. The match was abandoned with Denmark leading 2-1. The incident recalled Eriksen’s cardiac arrest at Euro 2021 and remarkable recovery.

title: 'Always felt he was a special player': Tendulkar reacts as Zverev breaks Grand Slam curse
content: Alexander Zverev won his first Grand Slam title by defeating Flavio Cobolli in a five-set French Open final. The victory ended years of disappointment after three previous major final losses. Sachin Tendulkar praised Zverev, saying, “Always felt he was a special player!” Cobolli impressed with a strong challenge, but Zverev dominated the deciding set to claim the title.

title: MP YouTuber robbed of Rs 8 lakh days after flaunting jewellery online
content: A village YouTuber from Shivpuri, Madhya Pradesh, was robbed of nearly Rs 8 lakh in cash and valuables, including jewellery and a crate of energy drinks, after burglars broke into her home. The intruders reportedly bolted her bedroom door from the outside while she and her husband slept.

title: Portal errors, passive helplines fox CBSE students on last day of re-evaluation
content: MORE CBSE GLITCHES I Login Failures, Roll-Number-Not-Found Errors, Payment Issues, Captcha Failures And Unresponsive Web Page

title: FIFA World Cup: Mass shooting near England's base camp leaves 9 injured
content: A mass shooting in Kansas City left nine people injured just days before England's arrival for the 2026 FIFA World Cup, drawing renewed attention to tournament security preparations. Police stressed the incident was unrelated to the World Cup and occurred away from official venues. All victims are expected to survive as authorities continue investigating while teams prepare to arrive.

title: ‘Drishyam 3’ collection day 18: Mohanlal’s film sees 30.8% growth
content: Mohanlal's 'Drishyam 3' is experiencing a box office resurgence, with its third weekend collections showing a significant uptick. The film has now amassed over Rs 234 crore globally, with Kerala leading the charge. Beyond the suspense, the movie delves into Georgekutty's emotional turmoil and the societal implications of romanticizing antiheroes.

title: ‘I'm confused about his career’: Manjrekar fires shots at Bumrah's workload management
content: Former India batter Sanjay Manjrekar voiced concerns over Jasprit Bumrah's inconsistent availability for national duty. He expressed confusion regarding Bumrah's career path, particularly his absence from upcoming T20I tours after a full IPL season. Manjrekar also revealed Bumrah was his preferred choice for T20 captaincy, a role now taken by others due to the pacer's limited commitments.

title: Why Manav Suthar's parents couldn't watch his India debut
content: Manav Suthar's impressive Test debut against Afghanistan was marked by his family's early departure from the stadium due to nerves and superstition. Despite his father's absence during the crucial second day, Suthar delivered a stellar 3/21 spell, repaying the team management's faith. His father emphasized Manav's dedication and his childhood coach's guidance.

title: ‘Peddi’ BO day 4: Ram Charan–Janhvi Kapoor film crosses Rs 233 cr
content: Ram Charan and Janhvi Kapoor's 'Peddi' saw a significant surge in its fourth-day earnings, crossing Rs 31.90 crore domestically. The film's worldwide gross has now touched approximately Rs 233.02 crore, with its Telugu version driving revenue. Meanwhile, Nithya Menen commented on on-screen objectification, advocating for actors to assert boundaries.

title: Akhilesh alleges massive fraud with Ram Temple money; trust says audit underway
content: It is very sensitive news for devotees of Lord Ram across the world that crores of rupees from donations made to the Ram Temple have been found missing, says Samajwadi Party president Akhilesh Yadav

title: Veerappan’s claim: Actor Sukanya wins defamation case after 30 years
content: Madras High Court directs Sun TV Network to pay her ₹10 lakh towards damages for not editing out scandalous allegations made against her by forest brigand Veerappan in a 1996 interview

title: Chief Minister travels by Metro to avoid Zero-Traffic arrangements in Bengaluru
content: Shivakumar is visiting Kanakapura, his home turf, first time after becoming the Karnataka Chief Minister to meet and extend his gratitude to the people of his constituency

title: Woman killed, daughter injured in wild elephant attack in Kerala’s Idukki
content: Forest dept officials said the woman was walking her daughter to school when they encountered two wild elephants standing on the road. Due to heavy rain and thick mist, she failed to notice the animals

title: Internet services suspended, prohibitory orders imposed in Jaipur for anti-encroachment drive
content: The demolition drive includes the removal of five religious structures encroaching within the Nandpuri road’s designated boundary

title: Irregular collection of garbage  leads to proliferation of blackspots in Bengaluru
content: The NammaKasa portal, which tracks blackspots in the city, reported 5,445 active blackspots on Sunday (June 7); just a month earlier, the number stood at 3,200

title: Adityaraj Capital ponzi scheme case transferred to CID by Belagavi police
content: The Belagavi Police Commissioner says that it has been done as money involved in ponzi schemes run by the agency is beyond ₹50 crore

title: Sustained afforestation efforts under MGNREGA transforms barren land in Bidar into thriving green forest
content: The project has not only restored ecological balance in the area but also improved groundwater recharge, generated rural employment and created a vibrant green space for the local community

title: Five Government Tool Room and Training Centre students selected by Germany’s Rheinbahn AG
content: The government of Karnataka looks forward to scaling this model to benefit many more candidates from across the State in the coming years

title: Heavy rain alerts continue across Kerala as monsoon remains active
content: Authorities have urged residents in landslide, mudslide and flash flood-prone areas to remain vigilant and move to safer locations if advised by officials

title: Minorities Commission takes up complaints of reluctance by banks to extend loans to beneficiaries from minority communities in Karnataka
content: Complaints had also been received that educational loan applications submitted by students were pending with banks

title: Lack of privacy, toilets, persistent stigma force girls in Odisha to miss school during menstruation
content: While 94% of the surveyed schools had separate toilets for girls, the lack of basic menstrual hygiene support systems, and non-availability of water and soap were cited as major hurdles

title: AICC functionary Suraj Hegde passes away
content: The Leader of Opposition in Lok Sabha Rahul Gandhi, AICC President Mallikarjun M. Kharge, Chief Minister D.K. Shivakumar and KPCC President B. K. Hariprasad were among the many leaders who offered their condolences

title: BJP announces candidates from Karnataka, Madhya Pradesh for Rajya Sabha polls
content: The Rajya Sabha polls for 24 seats in 10 States, including Arunachal Pradesh, Gujarat, Madhya Pradesh, Rajasthan, Manipur and Karnataka, will be held on June 18

title: Indian Envoy Vinay Mohan Kwatra meets senior U.S. counter-terror official
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi and U.S. President Donald Trump, in February 2025, reaffirmed that the global scourge of terrorism must be fought

title: BJP chooses OBC leader Prof. Nagaraja as candidate for Rajya Sabha polls from Karnataka
content: WIth BJP selecting M. Nagaraja, who hails from OBC community, the speculation over former PM Deve Gowda getting one more opportunity ends

title: There was no revolt against party high command in September 2022, says Congress veteran Ashok Gehlot
content: The former Rajasthan Chief Minister claims a “wrong perception” was spread, and there was a conspiracy to defame him

title: West Bengal Government to provide jobs to kin of BJP workers killed in 2021 post-poll violence
content: Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari also announces one-time financial assistance of ₹5 lakh for all the affected families from the Chief Minister’s Relief Fund

title: Neutralise miscreants if found roaming with weapons in civilian areas of Manipur: CRPF DG
content: Says it is expected that there will be a turnaround in the situation in the northeastern State within 1-1.5 years

title: LPG price hikes: Modi govt. will pay a political price, says Sharad Pawar
content: Mr. Pawar’s statement comes in the wake of increase in price of domestic cooking gas by ₹29 per cylinder

title: Considerable emphasis put on developing Swadeshi jurisprudence: CJI Surya Kant
content: The Chief Justice of India describes ‘Swadeshi jurisprudence’ as one that remains attentive to India’s constitutional values, institutional realities, linguistic diversity, and social conditions. Serious efforts are underway to explore establishing an indigenous AI ecosystem for the judiciary, he says.

title: Nabin instructs BJP cadre in Jharkhand to gear up for 2029 Assembly election
content: Mr. Nabin asserted that Jharkhand will remain a BJP stronghold. He also directed that regular monthly meetings be held at all levels from the state down to the ‘Mandal’ level, to maintain continuous communication with grassroots workers.

title: Government hospitals’ share in organ donation rises in Tamil Nadu
content: A number of factors has contributed to this, including systematic reorientation for government doctors, standardisation of operational protocols, and multi-level periodic reviews

title: KWA issues notice to firm over water supply disruptions in Kochi
content: Over 5,000 households in the West Kochi region had been affected following a major leak in a pipeline near Perumanoor on May 18; delay in Aluva water treatment plant maintenance also hit supply

title: 33 years later, a conviction in Bihar’s Vaishali district
content: It took the courts over three decades to sentence an 85-year-old man to three years in jail in an attempt-to-murder case in Bihar’s Vaishali district. A report on the story behind the judgement and the area, which police say is overrun by country-made guns and illicit liquor

title: Kargil seminary wants new liquor policy shelved, warns of protests
content: Leaders say liquor has no place in Ladakhi society and that opening liquor outlets under the new policy would have negative consequences for the younger generation and society at large

title: ‘Instagram friends’ abduct, sexually harass minor girl, seven juveniles among nine arrested
content: A missing person case turns out to be one of abduction and sexual assault; girl traced and rescued after several days and tells police that she was sexually assaulted

title: ‘Third Mumbai’ will be built only over our dead bodies, says former judge and activist B.G. Kolse Patil
content: Farmers are agitated over the compensation provisions made by the MMRDA, the authority managing the Third Mumbai or Karnala-Sai-Chirner (KSC) New Town project

title: Malayalam actor Salim Kumar cremated with State honours
content: Funeral of the 57-year-old actor, who died due to cardiac arrest while undergoing treatment at a private hospital in Kochi on June 6, was conducted on the premises of Laughing Villa, his residence at Chittattukara in Ernakulam

title: J&K tribal leader who protested at demolition site faces charges of ‘attempt to murder, rioting with deadly weapons’
content: Talib Hussain Choudhary was arrested on June 1 from Bandhi-Ragura village, where 32 structures belonging to tribals were demolished in an anti-encroachment drive. PDP chief Mehbooba Mufti demands his immediate release.

title: Kerala government issues orders reinstating suspended IAS officers B. Ashok and N. Prasanth in service
content: Pransanth was placed under suspension in November, 2024, which has since been extended multiple times whereas Ashok had been suspended in April this year

title: Four workers die after inhaling toxic fumes at septic tank in Surat
content: While asphyxiation is likely the primary cause of their death, the exact cause will be confirmed by the postmortem report, says Deputy Commissioner of Police

title: Yogandhra-2026 launches in Andhra Pradesh with 25,000 registrations
content: The initiative, aims at involving one crore people in yoga activities ahead of International Yoga Day on June 21, will continue until June 20 with awareness and promotional programmes across all 28 districts

title: PM Modi congratulates Major Abhilasha Barak on being conferred UN Military Gender Advocate Award
content: Major Barak, currently serving with the United Nations mission in Lebanon, has been honoured with the award for her outreach efforts with women and girls during her deployment in the West Asian nation

title: Eggs thrown at Trinamool leaders, workers as public anger mounts in Bengal
content: The egg attacks started on May 30 when Trinamool MP Abhishek Banerjee faced an irate mob in Sonarpur near Kolkata; locals threw eggs at Mr. Banerjee who had to wear a helmet for protection

title: Traffic diversions announced around Jubilee Hills for H-CITI flyover, underpass works
content: Commuters have been urged to avoid peak traffic hours between 8.30 a.m. and 11 a.m. and between 5 p.m. and 9 p.m.

title: 23 opposition parties to attend ‘INDIA janbandhan’ meet: Congress
content: Projecting unity, Congress says even those who are skipping meet have conveyed their strong opposition to Narendra Modi government’s policies

title: Protest will continue until Education Minister Pradhan resigns: Cockroach Janta Party founder Dipke
content: Abhijeet Dipke says the Jantar Mantar protest on June 6 was a success and more than 7,000 people took part in it. The next move will be decided in discussion with the members of the movement, he says

title: 4,800 illegal infiltrators deported to Bangladesh, says Bengal CM Suvendu
content: Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari said that holding centres have been set up in bordering districts of the State and 836 ‘illegal infiltrators’ who are being kept in the holding centres will soon be deported to Bangladesh

title: Oil marketing companies losing nearly Rs 700 per domestic LPG cylinder, says government
content: Atul Mathur is a Senior Assistant Editor at The Times of India with over 27 years of experience in journalism. Based in Delhi, he has spent much of his career reporting on governance, public policy and politics, churning out researched, data-driven stories that impact daily lives. Atul is known for investigative depth and strong human-interest narratives as he strives to bring clarity and context to complex issues. He currently tracks the energy sector, writing on power, renewable energy, coal and mines. content: BJP's media in-charge in J&K alleged he was denied accommodation at a hotel in Maharashtra's Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar . the owner of the hotel was courteous and candid . he acknowledged that the decision was unfair and hurtful .

CPM is publicly slamming Congress for its Kerala campaign of accusing just-ousted Left CM Pinarayi Vijajayan of being in cahoots with BJP .

content: the owner of the property said he wants the former governing party of Bengal to vacate the premises . his appeals to the party to move out went unheeded, prompting him to seek police help to get his property back . the father-son duo indicated they would seek legal recourse to evict the party from the canal South Road address .

content: From handcuffed extra-terrestrials to an orbital missile command center -- US President Donald Trump is unleashing a relentless stream of AI-generated imagery that analysts view as an effort to dominate the...

title: Casualty Of Punjab BJP's Kewal Singh Dhillon Move: Internal Cohesion
content: The incident is a symptom of dissatisfaction that is brewing within the party. The BJP's old guard appears increasingly uneasy with the pace and direction of recent changes.

content: US Iran War LIVE Updates: Iran closed the airspace around Tehran's Imam Khomeini International Airport, the country's main airfield, after the Israeli attack.

content: The personnel must not hesitate to open fire if needed, CRPF Director General GP Singh is heard saying in a speech that has since gone viral.

content: Stock Market, Sensex, Share Market, Nifty LIVE Updates: Oil prices rise more than $2 after Israel launched renewed strikes.

title: Sabarimala Gold Heist Case Back In High Court, Probe Team To Submit Final Report
content: The court will hear in detail the government's appeal seeking cancellation of the bail granted to the temple's chief priest.

title: Wanted UP Criminal Killed In Encounter. He Had 40 Cases, Rs 1 Lakh Reward
content: Bhanu Pratap Singh sustained injuries during the encounter by the UP Special Task Force and was declared dead when brought to a hospital.

title: "I Call Shots": Trump Says Netanyahu Has "No Choice" But To Accept Iran Deal
content: Trump said that Iran's strikes on Israel have not changed his desire to conclude US-Iran negotiations. "It's not going to have any impact on the deal," he said.

title: INDIA Bloc Meet Live Updates: Pointed Fingers Or Alliance Unity? All Eyes On Delhi Meeting
content: INDIA Bloc Meet Live Updates: 23 political parties of the INDIA bloc are likely to meet after key partners TMC and DMK faced defeat in the recently concluded Assembly polls.

title: CPM Leaders Named In Rs 50 Lakh Alleged Tribal Fund Scam In Kerala's Wayanad
content: An internal inquiry has reportedly found that nearly Rs 50 lakh earmarked for tribal welfare was diverted between 2021 and 2023 through unauthorised transactions involving Kudumbashree officials.

title: How Average Earners Quietly Build Crores While High Earners Fall Behind

title: NEET paper setters to be in lockdown till re-exam
content: Manash Pratim Gohain is a seasoned journalist with over two decades at The Times of India, where he has built a rich body of work spanning education policy, politics, and governance. Renowned for his incisive coverage of the National Education Policy (NEP) 2020, accreditation reforms, and skilling initiatives, he has also reported on student politics, urban policy, and social movements. His political reportage—both reflective and news-driven—adds depth to his writing, bridging policy with public impact. Through his 2,500 articles and related outlets, he has emerged as a trusted voice in national discourse, particularly in linking education reform to broader societal change. Read More
